chapters.title: Simple Linear Regression
chapters.transcript: Y = α + βX + ε. Ordinary least squares. R-squared. Interpreting coefficients.

chapters.title: Multiple Regression
chapters.transcript: Adding controls. Adjusted R-squared. Multicollinearity. Dummy variables.

chapters.title: Hypothesis Testing in Regression
chapters.transcript: T-tests for individual coefficients. F-test for joint significance. Confidence intervals.

chapters.title: Causality and Endogeneity
chapters.transcript: Omitted variable bias, reverse causality. Instrumental variables. Natural experiments.

chapters.title: Panel Data Models
chapters.transcript: Fixed effects and random effects. Within transformation. Hausman test.
